title: Office of Naval Research
description: Discovery and Invention portfolio sponsors research in multiple Research Areas. Key research initiatives include core basic and applied research programs executed by ONR Program Officers, research performed at naval laboratories, and two initiatives managed by the Director of Research (the Basic Research Challenge and the Young Investigator Program).
text:
The Office of Naval Research (ONR) sponsors research in multiple areas. Key research initiatives include core basic and applied research programs executed by ONR program officers and research performed at naval laboratories.
There are three additional initiatives managed by ONR:
University Research Initiatives
Basic Research Challenge
Young Investigator Program
Research awards are made in response to the broad agency announcements. The grant awards are made and managed by ONR program officers and performed by researchers at organizations, universities, naval laboratories and industry.
